en: It wasn't even the affair that got her canned.
ko: 불륜 때문에 잘린 게 아니야. 오히려 섹스 비행기가 몇 주 더 버티게 해줬지.

en: If anything, the sex plane probably bought her a few weeks, you know?
ko: 불륜 때문에 잘린 게 아니야. 오히려 섹스 비행기가 몇 주 더 버티게 해줬지.

en: Trump was like, she's a huge embarrassment in every way, except for that flying-fuck-palace
ko: 트럼프도 "모든 면에서 창피하지만 그 날아다니는 섹스 궁전은 인정, 게임 알아보는 거야"라고 했겠지.

en: game-recognized girl. And don't worry too much about Christie.
She's already got a new job that's every bit as important.
The current secretary, Christie Noem, will be moving to be special envoy
ko: 놈 걱정은 마. 벌써 똑같이 중요한 새 직책을 받았어.

en: for the Shield of the Americas, because our new security initiative in the Western Hemisphere...
ko: 크리스티 놈 장관이 미주의 방패 특사로 옮겨요. 서반구의

en: Yes, the special envoy for the Shield of the Americas Western Hemisphere Division.
You know it's a promotion when the job was just invented
six minutes ago using refrigerator magnets.
Now that Noem's out at Homeland Security, who's replacing her?
ko: 직책이 6분 전에 냉장고 자석으로 만들어졌으면 승진인 거 알 수 있지.

en: You know what? I don't care who it is, just as long as it's someone with one first name.
The president has named Oklahoma Senator Mark Wayne Mullen
ko: 놈이 국토안보부에서 나갔으니 누가 대체하지? 아무나 상관없어.

en: to be the next DHS secretary.
ko: 이름이 하나인 사람이면 돼. 대통령이 오클라호마 상원의원 마크 웨인 멀린을

en: Goddamn it! Now, obviously, Mark Wayne Mullen
can't be senator and a cabinet secretary at the same time.
So the way it works is, Mark will serve as Oklahoma senator
ko: 마크 웨인 멀린은 상원의원과 각료를 동시에 할 수 없어.

en: while Wayne will run DHS.
I-I turn when I turn.
ko: 마크가 오클라호마 상원의원을 하고 웨인이 DHS를 맡아.

en: Good luck to Mark Wayne, and congrats to Corey Lewandowski.
He now gets to bang Mark Wayne Mullen on that point.
